name: browser-use
description: Browser Use plugins for coding agents — drive a real browser, then edit the video of it.

plugins.name: browser-harness
plugins.description: Direct CDP browser control for coding agents: coordinate clicks, screenshots, a persistent Python session, and bulk HTTP — driving the user's real Chrome or a Browser Use cloud browser. Ships skills only; the browser-harness CLI is a one-time install prerequisite.

plugins.name: video-use
plugins.description: Edit videos with a coding agent. Drop raw footage in a folder, chat, get final.mp4 — transcript-driven cuts, auto color grade, subtitles, self-eval. Ships skills only; clone + ffmpeg + ElevenLabs key are a one-time install prerequisite.
